publicVars.description: Set medias base path where medias are serving. Default: '.'
Set language code to display a page in selected language. Default: 'en-us'
Set 'light' or 'dark' theme to match users' theme in a product. Default: 'light'
Set ZoomIn action to be triggered when users click on images. Provided action will be called in window.jbCefQuery
Set GIF PLayer action to be triggered when users click on gif previews. Provided action will be called in window.jbCefQuery
Set to true if the page is displayed in Chinese
